before_start: Read {{PRD_PATH}} (full doc or sections named in the task)
Worker: one PRD-REFACTOR in work in progress; highest priority first
during_work: Merge sections_to_merge into target_section; dedupe conflicting requirements
Priority: implementation > progress.md > newer PRD text
Update cross-links and table of contents
before_finish: Update PRD change history section if present
Optional: one-line gotcha in docs/new-agents.md per admission rules

tasks.description: Example: merge backlog subsection into main PRD section
acceptance_criteria: Target section contains merged canonical requirements
Section 3.5 no longer duplicates the same behavior
test_steps: Search PRD for duplicate contradictory statements
Verify table of contents matches headings
